home.title: Welcome to the Club
home.intro: We're a tabletop RPG club running D&D, Delta Green, and more. Browse our Game Masters, check the log of every session we've played, and join us at the table.
home.newHereAfter: and we'll get back to you.

about.title: About Us
about.body: We're a group of friends who get together to play tabletop RPGs. This site tracks who's run and played what, so we can look back on the campaigns we've shared.

gameMasterDetail.noBio: This game master hasn't written a bio yet.

poll.title: Rate this session
poll.loginPrompt: Log in as a club member to vote and see results.
poll.voteToSeeResults: Cast your vote above to see how everyone else rated this session.

comments.title: Comments
comments.placeholder: Share your thoughts on this session…
comments.loginPrompt: Log in as a club member to post a comment.

signup.title: Join the Club
signup.intro: Membership is by admin approval. Fill this out and we'll get in touch.
signup.submittedBody: Thanks! An admin will review your request and reach out once you're approved.

login.title: Log In
login.newPasswordIntro: This is your first login — choose a permanent password.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.bioGmHint: (shown on your public Game Master page)
profile.avatarHint: Upload a new profile picture (JPEG, PNG or WebP).

logGame.title: Log a Game
logGame.missingFields: Title, date, system and DM are required

admin.title: Admin
admin.anonymizeLabel: Replace player names with nicknames for logged-out visitors
admin.logGameMoved: Game logging moved to its own page so Game Masters can log their own sessions too.
